## Requirement

Archived FR from M12; preserved under `specs/frs/archive/` with filename stem unchanged (AC-41.4). Excluded from the default INDEX.

## Acceptance Criteria

- AC-W.1: Archived FR excluded from INDEX.md default listing
- AC-W.2: Filename stem identical to the pre-archival path

## Technical Design

`git mv` moved the file from `specs/frs/<ulid>.md` to `specs/frs/archive/<ulid>.md` at Phase 4 completion.

## Testing

Covered by snapshot comparison.

None.
